results.title: Ice cold bats limit LSU softball as it falls to Alabama in Game 1 of Super Regionals
results.description: LSU softball fell for the first time in the NCAA Tournament on Friday as it surrendered to Alabama 7-0 in the Tuscaloosa Super Regional. The purple and gold’s hot offense was stifled by the Crimson Tide’s Jocelyn Briski in Game 1 of the best-of-three series. The Tigers were limited to one hit in the contest... The post Ice cold bats limit LSU softball as it falls to Alabama in Game 1 of Super Regionals appeared first on Reveille .

results.title: Gerrit Cole pitches 6 shutout innings for Yankees after 569-day absence
results.description: NEW YORK — New York Yankees ace Gerrit Cole pitched six shutout innings in his return from elbow ligament reconstruction that caused a 569-day absence, leaving with a 1-0 lead against the Tampa Bay Rays on Friday night.

results.title: Nashville SC hoping for Sam Surridge's return vs. NYCFC
results.description: Nashville SC will hope to see leading scorer Sam Surridge return Saturday night when they host a New York City FC side trying to rebound from a devastating injury to club legend Maxi Moralez.

results.title: Kansas City, Red Bulls each look to carry momentum into World Cup break
results.description: After a dreadful start to the season, Sporting Kansas City hope a rare winning streak can help turn things around ahead of an interconference meeting with the visiting New York Red Bulls on Saturday.

results.title: Defenseless FC Cincinnati, Orlando City figure to score on Saturday
results.description: Two of the worst defensive teams in MLS meet on Saturday evening as FC Cincinnati plays host to Orlando City. Scoring goals hasn't been a problem for Cincinnati; its 30 goals are tied for third in MLS.
